Create a README.md file at the root of your GitHub repository that includes the following:

1. Explanation of your project: Movies Web Service with CRUD operations for movies schema and their given reviews by users. This project doesn't opt in for the extra credit.


2. Installation and usage instructions: Click the Render link to deploy this web service prior to testing API calls with Postman ---> https://pham-csc3916-assignment3-render.onrender.com/ 

3. Link to your Postman test collection:
[<img src="https://run.pstmn.io/button.svg" alt="Run In Postman" style="width: 128px; height: 32px;">](https://app.getpostman.com/run-collection/51584158-4e71ece6-e72e-499d-83d1-6b4dcd471750?action=collection%2Ffork&source=rip_markdown&collection-url=entityId%3D51584158-4e71ece6-e72e-499d-83d1-6b4dcd471750%26entityType%3Dcollection%26workspaceId%3D8ea196ab-b58d-4ddd-a163-449542b34e03#?env%5BPHAM-HW4-Environment-MoviesAPI%)


4. The environment settings: Database hosted by MongoDB. Sensitive links are hidden in local .env
